deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.subtitle: This action is permanent and cannot be undone after the grace period.
deleteAccount.consequence1: All active rides will be cancelled immediately
deleteAccount.consequence2: Your personal data will be anonymized
deleteAccount.consequence3: Your account will be permanently deleted after {{days}} days
deleteAccount.consequence4: Payment methods and ride history will be removed

deleteAccount.finalConfirmMessage: Your account will be scheduled for deletion. You have 30 days to cancel this action.
deleteAccount.passwordRequired: Please enter your password to confirm
deleteAccount.scheduledMessage: Your account is scheduled for deletion on {{date}}. You can cancel this below.
deleteAccount.gracePeriodInfo: You have 30 days to change your mind. After that, all your data will be permanently removed.
deleteAccount.cancellationSuccessMessage: Your account deletion has been cancelled. Welcome back!

faq.howToBook: How do I book a ride?
faq.howToBookAnswer: Open the app, enter your destination, choose a vehicle type, and tap 'Request Ride'.
faq.paymentMethodsAnswer: We accept cash and card payments. You can set your preferred method in Payment Settings.
faq.cancelRide: How do I cancel a ride?
faq.cancelRideAnswer: You can cancel a ride before the driver arrives by tapping 'Cancel Ride' in the ride details screen.
faq.pricingAnswer: Fares are based on distance, time, and current demand. You'll see the estimated fare before confirming your ride.
faq.safetyAnswer: All our drivers are verified and vehicles are inspected. You can share your ride details with trusted contacts.

about.description: Lulini Georgia is your trusted transportation partner in Georgia. We provide safe, reliable, and affordable taxi services across the country. Whether you need a quick ride across town or a comfortable journey to explore Georgia's beautiful landscapes, we've got you covered.
about.rateAppDesc: Love Lulini? Leave us a review!
